job.title: Security Operations Engineer (SecOps)
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Join the SecOps team in Avignon to ensure the monitoring, detection, and response to security incidents. You work on SIEM, vulnerability management, and hardening of information systems.
mission.2: Analyse security alerts and qualify incidents
mission.5: Participate in security audits and penetration tests
mission.7: Veille technologique sur les nouvelles menaces
profile.1: Master's degree (Bac+5) in Computer Science, cybersecurity specialisation
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in operational security
profile.3: Proficiency in a SIEM (Splunk, QRadar, Elastic)
profile.4: Knowledge of frameworks MITRE ATT&CK, NIST
profile.5: Certifications CISSP, CEH ou GCIH is a pluss
